name: 爪子刀（★） | 蓝钢
descriptionEn: With its curved blade mimicking a tiger's claw, the karambit was developed as part of the southeast Asian martial discipline of silat. The knife is typically used with a reverse grip, with the finger ring on the index finger. It has been cold blued. This is the malbec of weapon design - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 其弯曲的刀片如同猛虎的利爪一般，爪子刀是作为东南亚马来武术的一部分被研制出来的。这把匕首通常是用食指和无名指反握使用的。 这把武器已完全被染蓝。 堪称武器设计中的马尔贝克 - 军火商布兹
